subcodes.first_line: In truth, they who card cotton have attained unto the fruit of existence. My Pen beareth witness to their detachment, My tongue to their turning unto Me, and My heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه ندافها بثمره وجود فائز گشتند یشهد قلمی بانقطاعهم و لسانی باقبالهم و قلبی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @words vs deeds
